Plaintiff Scott Bruscella'S Motion To Cmpel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Set No. Two (Continued From 7/29/10 Per Mfw Recusal)
Off Calendar Aug-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Rebecca Paul, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Scott Bruscella
David W. Ammons, DCA, for Defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Scott Bruscella'S Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff's Special Interrogatories, Set Two And Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is denied as the Zerga report. The motion is granted as to the interrogatories. Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Plaintiff Scott Bruscella'S Motion To Cmpel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Set No. Two (Continued From 7/29/10 Per Mfw Recusal)

MINI MINUTES:

Defendant shall file and serve a declaration supporting the claim of privilege on or before August 9, 2010. Any reply to that declaration shall be made on or before August 11, 2010. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Set No. One; For Roder That Requests For Admissions Set No. One Be Deemed Admitted; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Linda Ross, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Scott Bruscella
No other appearance stated. After hearing, Plaintiff Scott Bruscella's Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, [Sets No. One], For Order That Request For Admission Set No. One Be Deemed Admitted, And Request For Sanctions.
1. Motion to compel responses to plaintiff's form interrogatories and special interrogatories, is taken under submission.
Tentative adopted as to:
2. Request for production of documents [set no. one]:
a. As to requests for production nos. 1, 3, and 4, defendant shall provide a code compliant privilege log within ten days of the date of service of this order;
b. As to request for production no. 2, the parties shall confer to set a date for plaintiff to physically inspect the original prints of the subject photographs; or to arrange for defendant to provide fresh prints/reprints of the photographs, at plaintiff's expense, as the parties may agree;
c. As to all other requests, motion denied;
3. Motion that requests for admission set no. one be deemed admitted, off calendar, moot [verifications have been provided by responding party;
4. Request for sanctions is taken under submission. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, Court Reporter: Leland Batara, CSR # 3759
